electrical_mechanisms.depletion_response.description: Capacitance changes because the depletion width varies with applied bias.

electrical_mechanisms.interface_trap_res.description: Capacitance or conductance includes a measurable contribution from trap occupancy dynamics.

electrical_mechanisms.charge_transfer_rc.description: Impedance is governed by a single dominant resistance-capacitance relaxation process.

electrical_mechanisms.nonideal_capacitiv.description: Impedance exhibits distributed time constants or constant-phase-element-like behavior.

electrical_mechanisms.diffusion_warburg_.description: Low-frequency impedance contains a diffusion-limited contribution represented by a Warburg-type tail.
